search.typeToSearch: Type at least two characters to search.

sideNav.label: Shortcuts
sideNav.signedOutSub: Sign in to save places, post events and connect with friends.

chrome.signInIntro: Sign in to follow venues and manage notifications.

auth.resetSentBody: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a link to reset your password. Open it to choose a new one.
auth.resetBody: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.confirmSentBody: We've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open it to confirm your account — you'll come straight back here, signed in.

errors.enterEmailPassword: Enter your email and a password.
errors.passwordMin: Use a password of at least 8 characters.
errors.signInFailed: Couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.startSignInFailed: Couldn't start sign-in. Please try again.
errors.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
errors.invalidLogin: That email or password doesn't match.
errors.alreadyRegistered: That email already has an account — try signing in instead.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.fallback: Couldn't complete that. Please check your details and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.signedOutIntro: Sign in to manage your account settings.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteBody: Permanently deletes your profile, posts, plans, chats and follows. This can't be undone.
danger.modalBody: This permanently removes your profile, posts, plans, chats, follows and saved offers. It can't be undone. Comments you left on others' walls stay, but no longer show your name.
danger.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

language.title: Language
language.label: App language
language.hint: More languages are on the way. Posts and community content stay in the language they were written in — your browser can translate those.

handle.label: Handle
handle.empty: Choose a handle — it's your profile's web address.
handle.hint: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores. This is your profile's web address.

profileEditor.bioPlaceholder: A line about you and the places you love.

errors.saveFailedRetry: Couldn't save your profile. Please try again.

accountHub.title: Your account
accountHub.signedOutIntro: Sign in to set up your profile and post to your wall.

notificationCenter.title: Notifications
notificationCenter.signedOutIntro: Sign in to see your notifications.
notificationCenter.empty: Nothing yet. When people reply to you, comment on your posts, or follow a venue you own, it'll show up here.

enableNotifications.signedOutIntro: Sign in to turn on notifications on this device.
enableNotifications.title: Notifications
enableNotifications.body: Get a heads-up on this device when venues you follow post something new.
enableNotifications.unsupported: This browser doesn't support web notifications.
enableNotifications.registered: This device is registered. You can manage delivery per venue by following them.

resetPassword.expiredBody: Your reset link is invalid or has already been used. Request a new one from the sign-in screen.
resetPassword.doneBody: Your password has been changed and you're signed in. You can head back to your account now.
resetPassword.chooseBody: Choose a new password for your account.

firstRun.title: Welcome to Roam
firstRun.intro: Two quick things so friends recognise you — and so the places you follow can send you a birthday treat.
firstRun.treatsOptIn: Send me birthday treats from places I follow
firstRun.privacyNote: Your birthday is private — businesses never see the date. It's only used to send the treats you've opted into. You can change any of this later in Settings.
firstRun.dobInvalid: That date of birth doesn't look right — please check it and try again.

birthdaySettings.title: Birthday & offers
birthdaySettings.treatsOptIn: Send me birthday treats from places I follow
birthdaySettings.privacyNote: Your birthday is private. Businesses never see it — it's only used to send you the birthday offers you've opted into, from places you already follow. You can clear it or turn this off anytime.

pushHistory.loadFailed: Couldn't load push history just now.
pushHistory.empty: No pushes sent yet. When you post an update and tick “Notify followers”, it'll appear here.

authCallback.failedBody: We couldn't finish signing you in — you may have cancelled, or the link expired. Please try again.

recentChats.title: Recent chats
recentChats.nudge: Sign in to see your conversations and plans with people nearby.
recentChats.error: Couldn't load your chats just now.
recentChats.empty: No chats yet. Message a friend or open a plan to start one — it'll show up here.

trending.title: Trending nearby
trending.error: Couldn't load venues near you just now.

townForum.title: Town forum
townForum.error: Couldn't load the forum just now.

savedDeals.title: Saved deals
savedDeals.empty: Deals you save will appear here, ready to redeem in-venue.

followed.title: Followed venues
followed.nudge: Follow a business to unlock its exclusive loyalty deals — they'll appear here, just for followers.
followed.error: Couldn't load your followed venues just now.
followed.empty: You're not following any businesses yet. Follow one to get its exclusive loyalty deals here.
followed.noDeals: No live deals from your venues right now — we'll show them here the moment one posts a loyalty offer.

plans.title: Your plans
plans.nudge: Make plans — a night out, a weekend, a list to try — and save venues to them.
plans.error: Couldn't load your plans just now.
plans.empty: No plans yet — start one and add venues from anywhere on Roam.

market.title: {place} market
market.body: Buy, sell and swap with people in your town — list something in a minute, agree in chat, meet locally.

homeFeed.title: Your local feed
homeFeed.error: Couldn't load your feed just now.
homeFeed.followingNudge: Sign in and follow your favourite local businesses — their news, offers and events land here.
homeFeed.emptyFollowing: No posts from venues you follow yet — follow a few on Explore and their updates will land here.
homeFeed.emptyLocal: Nothing moving in {place} just yet — check back soon, or be the one who starts something in the Town Hall.

homeCustomize.title: Customise home
homeCustomize.subtitle: Drag the handle to reorder, or hide the sections you see.

basecamp.title: Basecamp
basecamp.intro: Your Roam, your way — everything in

placeSwitcher.searchError: Couldn't search just now. Try again.
placeSwitcher.geoError: Couldn't get your location. Pick a place instead.

suggested.title: Suggested for you
suggested.intro: Tailored offer and post ideas — review and edit each one before it goes out.
suggested.published: Published — find it in Offers above to tweak or add a code.

nearbyDepartures.title: Nearby departures
nearbyDepartures.noDepartures: No departures in the next while.

comingSoon.title: Local transit
comingSoon.body: Live bus & train departures for {place} are on the way — powered by Translink, across Ireland.

birthdayOffer.intro: Set a treat and we'll deliver it automatically to followers on their birthday — the ones who've opted in. You never see whose birthday it is, only how many were sent.
birthdayOffer.redeemedPct: {pct}% of birthday treats have been redeemed.
birthdayOffer.detailsPlaceholder: Show this message in-venue on your birthday to claim.

explore.venuesInView: {count, plural, one {# venue in view} other {# venues in view}}

gate.title: Create a free account to keep exploring
gate.body: You've explored {limit} searched locations this session — the free limit. Your own location stays free; sign up to open {placeName} and anywhere else, save places, and follow the venues you love.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.body: No venues match this view. Try another category or place, or check back as Roam grows in your area.
empty.searchBody: We couldn't find that place on Roam or the web. Check the spelling, or try a shorter name.
empty.outOfAreaBody: We're expanding across the UK. Search for your town, or pick one of our live areas from the place menu above.

explore.searchingWebBody: Checking Roam and the wider web for this place.

posts.empty: No posts yet — when this venue posts news, offers or events they'll show here.

offers.empty: No live offers right now — check back, or follow to be notified.

claim.intro: Claiming is free. Sign in or create an account and this venue is yours to manage right away.
claim.ownerBody: Claim it free to add photos, opening times, your menu and links, and post offers and events to people nearby — about 90 seconds, and you can start editing straight away.
claim.knowBody: Help fellow locals — suggest a photo, the opening hours, or a fix.
claim.submittedBody: Thanks — your claim is now with us for verification. Once it's approved you'll be able to manage this venue, add photos and details, and post to people nearby.
claim.underReviewBody: A claim for this venue has been submitted and is being verified. Check back soon — once it's approved the venue's owner can keep its details up to date.
claim.bannerBody: Claim it free to add photos, offers, your menu & links — about 90 seconds.
claim.ownBody: Claim it to reply to reviews, post offers and reach every local following.

notFound.title: Venue not found
notFound.body: This venue may have been removed, or the link is wrong.

reviews.none: No reviews yet — be the first.

reviews.saveError: Couldn't save your review. Please try again.
reviews.promptSub: Rate it and help fellow locals decide.

venueDetail.suggestEditPrompt: Know this place? Help fellow locals — suggest a photo, the opening hours or a fix.
venueDetail.manageCardBody: Post updates, publish offers and manage your page.

localPosts.empty: No posts yet. Share news, an offer or an event — it appears on your venue page and in your town's local news feed.

composer.addSomething: Add a title, some text or a photo to post.
composer.insufficientCredits: Not enough push credits to notify followers. Untick “Notify followers” to post without a push.
composer.postFailedRetry: Couldn't post that. Please try again.
composer.footer: Appears on your venue page and in your town's local news feed.

media.signInToAdd: You need to be signed in to add images.

deals.title: Deals

deals.affiliateLinksTitle: Affiliate links — Roam may earn a commission

views.noPhotos: No photos yet — photos from wall posts show up here.

threadList.signedOutIntro: Your chats are private. Sign in to see them and start new ones.

empty.title: No chats yet
empty.body: Tap “New chat”, then search for someone — pick one person for a direct message, or several for a group. You can also message a friend from their profile, or open a plan to chat with everyone on it.

chatShareMenu.shareTitle: Share a place, plan, person or photo
chatShareMenu.plansEmpty: You have no plans yet. Create one from the Plans tab, then share it here.
chatShareMenu.friendsEmpty: No friends yet. Add friends from their profile walls, then share them here.

notFound.body: It may have been removed, or you don't have access.

planDetail.allFriendsOnPlan: All your friends are already on this plan.

addToPlan.signInTitle: Sign in to save to a plan
addToPlan.empty: No plans yet — make your first below.

sub.shops: Products, vouchers & experiences from local businesses in {place}.
sub.marketplace: Second-hand and handmade from real locals near {place}.

market.signInToPost: <link>Sign in</link> to post a listing — it takes a minute.
market.emptyBrowse: Nothing listed in {place} yet — be the first.

composer.title: New listing in {place}
composer.photoRules: Photos must be JPEG/PNG/WebP under 10 MB.
composer.titleMin: Give it a title (at least 3 characters).

marketShops.empty: No shops in {place} have stocked up yet — businesses add products from their dashboard, and they'll appear here the moment they do.
marketShops.noMatches: Nothing matches — try another category or search.

listingDetail.gone: This listing is gone — it may have been sold or removed. <link>Back to Market</link>
listingDetail.safetyNote: Roam doesn't handle payment for local listings — agree the details in chat and meet somewhere public. Never send money to someone you haven't met.
listingDetail.enquiryMessage: About your listing “{title}” — is it still available? {url}
listingDetail.reported: Reported — thanks, we’ll take a look.

venueShop.empty: This venue hasn't stocked its Roam shop yet — check back soon.
venueShop.payoutPending: Buying through Roam opens once this venue finishes its payout setup — for now, visit or message the venue to purchase.
venueShop.paymentsNote: Payments are handled securely by Stripe. Products are collected in venue; vouchers come with a redeem code in <link>your orders</link>.

myOrders.signedOutIntro: Sign in to see your orders.
myOrders.title: Your orders
myOrders.placedNote: Order placed — it'll show as Paid here within a few seconds of Stripe confirming.
myOrders.empty: Nothing yet — venue shops across Roam are stocking up. Find something in <link>Explore</link>.
myOrders.showCode: Show this code in venue to redeem:

friendsList.title: Friends
friendsList.signedOutIntro: Sign in to see your friends and requests.
friendsList.empty: No friends yet. Open someone's wall and tap ＋ Add friend to connect.
friendsList.mutualCount: {count, plural, one {# mutual friend} other {# mutual friends}}

userSearch.noFriendsYet: You haven't added any friends yet.
userSearch.noResults: No one found for “{query}”. Try a different name or @handle.
userSearch.hint: Search everyone on Roam by name or @handle.

following.title: Following
following.intro: Following a business opts you into its exclusive offers & promotions. Mute any of them below without unfollowing — you stay following, you just stop the notifications.
following.signedOutIntro: Your follows are private. Sign in to see the venues you follow and manage their notifications.
following.pushOnHint: You'll be notified of new deals

empty.title: Not following anything yet
empty.body: Follow a venue from Explore to get a heads-up when it posts. The venues you follow show up here.

reportVenue.signInToReport: Sign in to report this venue.
reportVenue.detailPlaceholder: e.g. wrongly claimed, closed, incorrect or abusive content…
reportVenue.thanks: Thanks — your report has been sent for review.

notFound.title: Venue not found
notFound.body: This venue doesn’t exist or is no longer available.

notOwner.title: You don’t manage this venue
notOwner.body: Only the venue’s owner can edit it. If you claimed it, your claim may still be under review.

stats.ordersAllTime: {count, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}} · all time

activityCard.title: Activity
activityCard.subtitle: What locals are doing with your business.

paymentsCard.title: Payments
paymentsCard.subtitle: Payouts for selling on Roam — powered by Stripe.

marketingCard.title: Marketing assistant
marketingCard.subtitle: Let Roam draft tailored offers & posts — you approve everything.

postsCard.title: Local posts
postsCard.subtitle: Post news, offers and events on behalf of your business. Each appears on your page and in your town's local news feed — this is also your posting history.

offersCard.title: Offers
offersCard.subtitle: Publish exclusive deals. Followers get notified; anyone can save them and redeem in-venue.

offerInsightsCard.title: Offer insights
offerInsightsCard.subtitle: Which deals land best with locals.

shopCard.title: Your shop
shopCard.subtitle: Products, services and vouchers you sell on Roam. Everything here shows on your public page's Shop tab.

ordersCard.title: Orders
ordersCard.subtitle: Sales come in here — mark them collected or redeemed in-venue, or refund.

notifyCard.title: Send a notification
notifyCard.subtitle: Message your followers' inbox — everyone, or one person.

pushHistoryCard.title: Push history
pushHistoryCard.subtitle: Every update you've sent, newest first.

photosCard.title: Photos
photosCard.subtitle: Upload your own — they take priority over public-source photos. Set a cover and reorder.

detailsCard.title: Details
detailsCard.subtitle: A description and the links people need — menu, booking, website.

hoursCard.title: Opening hours
hoursCard.subtitle: Set when you're open — powers the live “Open now” status on your page.

nextBestAction.titleNoFollowers: Get your first followers — post a local update
nextBestAction.titleFollowers: Your followers are listening — share this week's offer
nextBestAction.subNoFollowers: Posts appear in your town's feed, where locals discover businesses like yours.
nextBestAction.subFollowersCredits: {followers} locals follow you — and you've {credits, plural, one {# push credit} other {# push credits}} to notify them.

performance.title: Performance
performance.subtitle: Profile views and new followers, last {days} days.
performance.emptyChart: View tracking is live — as locals open your page, the trend draws itself here.

recentPosts.title: Recent posts
recentPosts.subtitle: How your latest updates performed.
recentPosts.empty: Nothing posted yet — your first local update will show up here and in your town's feed.

audience.yourAudienceSubtitle: Who follows you, in aggregate — never individual people.
audience.newFollowersTitle: {count, plural, one {# new follower} other {# new followers}}
audience.growthEmpty: Growth bars appear as people start following you.
audience.ageSubtitle: Aggregated & anonymised — shown only when the group is large enough.
audience.ageEmpty: Not enough followers have shared a birthday yet to show an age breakdown (kept private until the group is large enough to stay anonymous).
audience.birthdaySubtitle: A standing treat delivered automatically to opted-in followers on their birthday. You see counts, never who.
audience.birthdaysThisMonth: {count, plural, one {# opted-in follower has a birthday this month.} other {# opted-in followers have a birthday this month.}}

errors.addBothTimes: Add both an opening and closing time.
errors.sameTimes: Opening and closing time can't be the same.
errors.clearFailedRetry: Couldn't clear your hours. Please try again.
errors.saveFailedRetry: Couldn't save your hours. Please try again.

ownerMediaManager.publicSourcesNote: These come from public listings and can't be edited here. Upload your own photos above to show them first.

errors.imageType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG or WebP image.
errors.imageTooLarge: That image is over 10 MB. Please choose a smaller file.
errors.uploadedNotSaved: Uploaded, but couldn't save the photo. Please try again.
errors.reorderFailedRetry: Couldn't save the new order. Please try again.
errors.setCoverFailedRetry: Couldn't set the cover. Please try again.
errors.removeFailedRetry: Couldn't remove that photo. Please try again.

ownerDetailsEditor.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell people what makes this place worth a visit.

errors.invalidUrl: That doesn't look like a valid URL.
errors.saveFailedRetry: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

venueShopManager.empty: Nothing in your shop yet. Add what you sell — meal vouchers, gift cards, retail products, bookable experiences — and it shows on your public page. Online buying switches on soon.

composer.descriptionPlaceholder: A line or two — what is it, how is it collected or redeemed?

errors.badImageType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG or WebP image.
errors.imageTooLarge: That image is over 10 MB. Please choose a smaller file.
errors.titleMin: Give it a name (at least 3 characters).
errors.priceMin: The minimum price is £0.50 (card processing needs it).
errors.stockInvalid: Stock must be a whole number (or leave it empty).
errors.addFailedRetry: Couldn't add that — please try again.

venueOrders.refundConfirm: Fully refund this order? The buyer gets everything back.
venueOrders.empty: No orders yet — they land here the moment someone buys from your shop.

businessDashboard.title: Business
businessDashboard.signedOutIntro: Sign in to manage the venues you've claimed.

empty.title: No claimed venues yet
empty.body: Find your business in <link>Explore</link>, open its page and tap “Claim it free”. Once it’s approved it shows up here, ready to edit.

businessLanding.title: Run a local business? Claim it on Roam.
businessLanding.heroBody: People discover local places on Roam for free. Claiming your venue lets you keep it accurate — your photos, hours, description and links — and own how you show up.

find.title: Find your venue
find.body: It's probably already on Roam, listed from public sources. Search for it in Explore and open its page.

claim.title: Claim it free
claim.body: Tap “Claim it free” on the venue. Sign in (or create an account) — the same account you'd use to explore.

verify.title: Verify & manage
verify.body: We auto-verify when your email matches the business's website; otherwise a quick manual check. Then add photos, hours, a description and links.

perks.photos: Add and reorder real photos, set your cover image
perks.hours: Keep your opening hours accurate (live “open now”)
perks.description: Write your description and add your links
perks.followers: Followers get notified when you post (coming soon)

businessLanding.publicSourcesNote: Roam lists venues from public sources so locals can find you whether or not you've claimed — claiming is free and just hands you the keys to your page.

marketingSuggestions.loadFailed: Couldn't load your preferences just now.
marketingSuggestions.summaryOn: We'll suggest offers and posts tailored to you — never auto-published, always yours to edit first.
marketingSuggestions.summaryOff: Automated suggestions are off. Turn them on to get tailored offer and post ideas.
marketingSuggestions.intro: Want a hand marketing your business? Turn on automated suggestions and we'll propose offers and posts tailored to you — always yours to review and edit before anything goes out. Answer a few quick questions to make them relevant.
marketingSuggestions.capLabel: Maximum discount you're happy to offer: <pct>{cap}%</pct>
marketingSuggestions.typesLabel: Which kinds of deal would you run? (pick any)
marketingSuggestions.notesLabel: What products or services do you usually discount?
marketingSuggestions.notesPlaceholder: e.g. weekday lunch mains, first coffee for new customers, quiet-afternoon haircuts…

offerInsights.empty: No offer data yet. Publish a few deals and tag their type — once people save and redeem them, you'll see which kinds work best here.
offerInsights.topTheme: Your {label} deals are pulling the most interest so far — {saves} saves and {redemptions} redemptions.

venueNotify.noFollowers: No followers yet — once people follow you, you can send them a notification here (collectively or one at a time).
venueNotify.placeholderOne: Write a message to this follower…
venueNotify.placeholderAll: Write a message for your followers…
venueNotify.noneNotified: No one was notified (no matching followers).
venueNotify.sentTo: {count, plural, one {Sent to # follower.} other {Sent to # followers.}}
venueNotify.footer: Lands in their notifications (the bell). Followers who muted your offers still receive direct messages you send here.

errors.noRecipient: Pick a follower to send to.

venueActivity.empty: No activity yet. As people follow you and save your offers, you'll see it here.

venuePayments.notConfigured: Selling on Roam is nearly here — payment processing isn't switched on for this environment yet.
venuePayments.activeBody: You're set up to get paid — everything you sell pays out to the bank account you connected. Payout history and bank details live in your Stripe dashboard:
venuePayments.reviewingBody: Stripe is reviewing your details — payouts usually switch on within a day or two. Check back, or finish anything outstanding:
venuePayments.unfinishedBody: Your payout setup isn't finished yet. Pick up where you left off — it takes a few minutes:
venuePayments.connectBody: Connect a payout account to sell products, services and vouchers on Roam. Setup is handled securely by Stripe — Roam never sees your ID or bank details.

locationGate.title: See what's near you
locationGate.body: Share your location for local venues, plans and news.

presence.hint: Only your friends can see this, and it clears itself automatically.
presence.notePlaceholder: Add a note — e.g. Free for a coffee ☕
presence.locError: We couldn't get your location. Check your browser's location permission and try again.
presence.noneNearby: No friends are sharing their location right now.
presence.shareBlurb: Share your location so friends can find you. It's precise, only your friends see it, and it stops on its own.
presence.alertHint: While you're sharing your location, nearby friends get a heads-up that you're free.
presence.mapAria: Map of friends sharing their location nearby

presenceAlertSettings.title: Nearby friends
presenceAlertSettings.label: Let friends notify me when they're nearby and free
presenceAlertSettings.hint: When a friend is out and free to meet near you, you'll get a heads-up. Turn this off to stop those alerts — you'll still see friends on the Friends page.

invite.blurb: Your town's local guide — discover places, plans and the people near you.
invite.authIntro: Create your account to join and connect.
invite.alreadyIn: You're already signed in on Roam.
invite.cardBlurb: Roam is better with friends. Share your personal link — when someone joins through it, you're connected.
invite.shareText: I'm on Roam — our town's local guide. Join me:
